name: Sequence Role — Valid Pillar Admission
description: Evaluates whether the Sequence role cleanly admits a polished pillar at the Idle lane with no refusals.
needs_llm: Confirming a valid admission requires semantic understanding of pillar provenance and lane seeding rules.

parts.text: Please admit the pillar at docs/plans/pillars/fixture-sequence-target.md to the tracker queue. Set initial Lane to Idle.

rubric.criterion: Admits the pillar with the correct polished_pillar_plan reference and an Idle initial Lane, emitting no refusal codes
